pages.title: About BelgradeBest
pages.lede: What this site is, who it's for, and the editorial bar we hold ourselves to.
pages.body: BelgradeBest is being built. The full about page lands as part of the first content milestone.
pages.seoDescription: An honest English-language guide to Belgrade. Evergreen by design, monetised lightly and visibly.

pages.title: How we make money
pages.lede: What we get paid for, how we choose what to recommend, and what we will not do.
pages.body: The full disclosure lands with the first content milestone. The short version: earned-placement affiliate links where they are the genuinely useful answer on a page, never wall-to-wall widgets, never anything that compromises the editorial bar.
pages.seoDescription: Honest, plain-English affiliate disclosure for BelgradeBest.

pages.title: Get in touch
pages.lede: Tips, corrections, partnership questions. We read everything.
pages.body: A contact form lands with the first content milestone.

pages.title: Privacy at BelgradeBest
pages.lede: The plain-English version: what we collect, what we don't, and how to reach us about it.
pages.body: The full privacy notice lands with the first content milestone.
pages.seoDescription: How BelgradeBest handles your data — short, plain, current.
